title: 10 best herbal teas for chickenpox
description: Euphrasia officinalis, also known as eyebright, teas helps with chickenpox because of its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal remedy contains flavonoids and tannins, which have been traditionally used to treat skin conditions and reduce fever. The tea's astringent properties also help to dry out blisters and soothe itchy skin, providing relief from the discomfort and pain associated with chickenpox.
